chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ يَمُوتُ فِي السَّفِينَةِ وَ لَا يُقْدَرُ عَلَى الشَّطِّ أَوْ يُصَابُ وَ هُوَ عُرْيَانٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – The ones who are dying in the ship and it is not able upon (getting to the) coast, or he is struck (by death) and he is nude

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (14/160)
text: هُ قَالَ فِي الرَّجُلِ يَمُوتُ مَعَ الْقَوْمِ فِي الْبَحْرِ فَقَالَ يُغَسَّلُ وَ يُكَفَّنُ وَ يُصَلَّى عَلَيْهِ وَ يُثْقَلُ وَ يُرْمَى بِهِ فِي الْبَحْرِ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, from someone else, from Aban, from a man,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said regarding the man who dies with the group in the sea, so heasws said: ‘He should be washed, and enshrouded, and Salaat would be prayed over him, and weight (tied to him), and he would be thrown into the sea’.
en.sarwar: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from more than one person from Aban from a man who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about one who dies in the company of people in the ocean. He (the Imam) said, ‘Ghusl (bath), shroud and Salah (prayer) are done for him and with some weight tied to him is thrown in the ocean.’”
